reason: Independent cross-language verification found fail-open omissions after the immutable G1 tag was published. The tag remains the common branch root; these corrections are mandatory release deltas and may not be relaxed by either lane.

rules: Every raw contract-step finality observation carries its validated block_hash and block_height into the verifier result.
Ordered contract-step block heights must be nondecreasing.
The state readback observed_block_height must be greater than or equal to the successful finalize_exact block_height.
A self-consistent state-readback artifact captured before finalize_exact is invalid even when its hashes and state fields otherwise verify.
Every public proof item contains deployment_domain, nullable for proof types without a v3 deployment identity.
A verified exact_envelope_v3 or native_treasury_execution_v1 item requires deployment_domain as lowercase 32-byte hex.
Two-pass exact-envelope and treasury verification requires exact equality of proposal_id, action_id, envelope_hash, network, package_hash, contract_hash, and deployment_domain.
Treasury temporal binding is snapshot_block_height < exact_v3_finalization_block_height == treasury_authorization_block_height <= native_execution_block_height.
Every contract-step finality block height is strictly greater than the installation block height.
Consecutive contract-step observations at an equal height must carry the identical canonical block hash.
A state readback at the exact-finalization height must carry the identical canonical block hash as finalize_exact.
The bounded native-transfer scan exposes the canonical hash observed at authorization_block_height.
The scan authorization block hash must equal the exact-v3 finalization block hash as well as matching its height.
A treasury execution on a competing block at the same height is invalid.
